a.curator_notes: Classic DACH Hörspiel series running since 1991 with 122+ main episodes. Spinoffs excluded: BFF Talk podcast series (8 episodes), Kinofilm audio adaptations (5 movies), ASMR Klangreisen (4 releases), Advent calendar, Live Hörspiel, Viktoria und Sarina Special, and various audiobook novels. English versions available under separate 'Bibi and Tina' artist. Episode 112 had duplicate releases - kept standard 20-track version, excluded extended 35-track re-release.
